judge_reason: Both agree on the main visual content: a typed report/letterhead with a crest/coat of arms and 'Newfoundland Constabulary' text; Description B adds significant detail (dates, quoted text, stamps, annotations) not mentioned by A, but there are no direct contradictions on the specific elements both describe.
original_image_tags: A typed report on official Newfoundland Constabulary stationery. The document is aged, with visible paper texture, punch holes at the top, and staining along the left edge. A crest is visible at the top center.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned black-and-white typed police report document headed “NEWFOUNDLAND CONSTABULARY,” with a crest at the top, station and date fields, a handwritten signature near the lower right, and the stamp “RESTRICTED” near the bottom.*
